required_preferences.fact: Takes a screen break every 30 minutes, regardless of workload, as required by her neurologist with the new migraine medication

supersedes.fact: Takes a screen break every 45 minutes as non-negotiable — refuses to skip, even during ticket surges

required_preferences.fact: Schedules daily joint activities with her son on weeknights, structuring her Security+ study sessions around his needs as a full-time cohabitant instead of prioritizing evening study blocks during split custody weeks

supersedes.fact: Limits joint activities with her son during split custody weeks to weekends and one weekday evening, allowing extra evening hours for Security+ study when required by certification deadlines

required_preferences.fact: Prefers responding to all user and colleague queries via encrypted chat and emergency phone calls during the cyber incident, suspending routine email and ticket replies except for mandatory logging.
Only communicates complex troubleshooting steps via video calls or screen shares — avoids long email instructions when remote
Schedules regular video calls with her partner during his fieldwork, maintaining connection despite physical distance
Meal preps all weekday lunches and snacks, never eats at campus cafes or orders takeout during the workweek

persona: A mid-career helpdesk technician working in a university IT department
